g.title: gnd-front
g.text: Ground block — front clip ↗ Front-clip module

g.title: gnd-rear
g.text: Ground block — rear / boot ↗ Rear / boot module

g.title: sw-turn
g.text: Turn-signal switch (column) — WEAK CONTACT ↗ Dashboard module

g.title: turn-rl
g.text: Rear turn LEFT ↗ Rear / boot module

g.title: turn-rr
g.text: Rear turn RIGHT ↗ Rear / boot module

g.title: sw-hazard
g.text: Hazard switch (added — in the old cigar-lighter location) ↗ Dashboard module

g.title: tail-rl
g.text: Tail/position + brake LEFT ↗ Rear / boot module

g.title: sw-wiper
g.text: Wiper switch (3-position) — DEDICATED, low-current ↗ 3-way switch cluster (firewall)

g.title: sw-heaterfan
g.text: Heater-fan switch (3-position) — DEDICATED, low-current ↗ 3-way switch cluster (firewall)

g.title: fan-resistor
g.text: Heater-fan PWM / resistor module (low speed, optional)

g.title: fuel-pump
g.text: Electric fuel pump ↗ Rear / boot module
